site.title: Esoteric Beat News
site.tagline: A confluence of esoteric studies media — every episode, in order, plus curated currents.
site.feed_blurb: Every episode from every source, newest first — the living outflow.

topics.title: Neoplatonism
topics.blurb: Plotinus, Iamblichus, Proclus, and the ascent of the soul.

topics.title: Kabbalah
topics.blurb: Jewish mysticism and the Tree of Life.

topics.title: Agrippa
topics.blurb: Heinrich Cornelius Agrippa and Occult Philosophy.

topics.title: History of Magic
topics.blurb: Intellectual and social history of magical practices.

topics.title: Mysticism
topics.blurb: Mystical theology and direct experience of the divine.

topics.title: Hermeticism
topics.blurb: Hermetic philosophy and the Corpus Hermeticum.

topics.title: Occultism
topics.blurb: Occult sciences and hidden knowledge traditions.

topics.title: Wicca
topics.blurb: Wiccan religion, Craft practice, and modern paganism.

scholars.name: Ronald Hutton
scholars.blurb: Historian of witchcraft, paganism, and early modern esotericism.

scholars.name: Frances Yates
scholars.blurb: Historian of Renaissance esotericism and the Hermetic tradition.

scholars.name: Peter Forshaw
scholars.blurb: Scholar of alchemy, laboratory practices, and transmutation.

scholars.name: William R. Newman
scholars.blurb: Historian of alchemy and early modern chemistry.

scholars.name: Lawrence M. Principe
scholars.blurb: Historian of alchemy and early science.

scholars.name: Kirsten Dzwiza
scholars.blurb: Archaeologist of Graeco-Egyptian magic, the Greek Magical Papyri, and ancient ritual practice (charaktêres).

scholars.name: Wouter Hanegraaff
scholars.blurb: Leading scholar of Western esotericism; theorist of rejected knowledge and Hermetic spirituality.

scholars.name: Richard Kaczynski
scholars.blurb: Historian of Aleister Crowley and Thelema; author of the biography Perdurabo.

scholars.name: Matteo Martelli
scholars.blurb: Historian of Graeco-Egyptian and Byzantine alchemy and ancient chemistry.

esotericists.name: Aleister Crowley
esotericists.blurb: English occultist, ceremonial magician, and founder of Thelema.

esotericists.name: Marsilio Ficino
esotericists.blurb: Renaissance Platonist who translated Hermes and Plato and revived natural magic.

esotericists.name: Heinrich Cornelius Agrippa
esotericists.blurb: Author of the Three Books of Occult Philosophy.

esotericists.name: John Dee
esotericists.blurb: Elizabethan magus, mathematician, and angelic (Enochian) seer.

esotericists.name: Giordano Bruno
esotericists.blurb: Hermetic philosopher of infinite worlds and the art of memory.

esotericists.name: Plotinus
esotericists.blurb: Founder of Neoplatonism and author of the Enneads.

esotericists.name: Iamblichus
esotericists.blurb: Neoplatonist theurgist, author of On the Mysteries.

esotericists.name: Pythagoras
esotericists.blurb: Sage of sacred number, harmony, and the transmigration of souls.

esotericists.name: Porphyry
esotericists.blurb: Neoplatonist, pupil of Plotinus, and editor of the Enneads.

esotericists.name: Paracelsus
esotericists.blurb: Renaissance physician-alchemist and father of spagyric medicine.

esotericists.name: Hermes Trismegistus
esotericists.blurb: Legendary author of the Hermetic corpus and the Emerald Tablet.

esotericists.name: Pico della Mirandola
esotericists.blurb: Renaissance humanist who married Kabbalah to Christian Platonism.

esotericists.name: Proclus
esotericists.blurb: Late Neoplatonist systematiser and theurgist.

esotericists.name: Carl Jung
esotericists.blurb: Depth psychologist of alchemy, archetypes, and the collective unconscious.

esotericists.name: Nicolas Flamel
esotericists.blurb: Legendary medieval alchemist said to have made the Philosophers' Stone.

esotericists.name: Isaac Newton
esotericists.blurb: Natural philosopher whose secret alchemical work filled thousands of pages.

esotericists.name: Manly P. Hall
esotericists.blurb: 20th-century author of The Secret Teachings of All Ages.

esotericists.name: Jacob Boehme
esotericists.blurb: German theosopher of the divine ground and spiritual alchemy.

esotericists.name: Roger Bacon
esotericists.blurb: Medieval friar, natural philosopher, and reputed alchemist.

esotericists.name: Zosimos of Panopolis
esotericists.blurb: Earliest named alchemical author, of visionary fame.

esotericists.name: Pseudo-Dionysius
esotericists.blurb: Author of the Mystical Theology and the celestial hierarchies.

esotericists.name: Emanuel Swedenborg
esotericists.blurb: Scientist-turned-visionary of heaven, hell, and correspondences.

esotericists.name: Robert Fludd
esotericists.blurb: English Paracelsian, defender of the Rosicrucians, macrocosm-microcosm.

esotericists.name: Hypatia of Alexandria
esotericists.blurb: Neoplatonist philosopher and mathematician of Alexandria.

esotericists.name: Dion Fortune
esotericists.blurb: 20th-century British occultist and author of The Mystical Qabalah.

esotericists.name: G. I. Gurdjieff
esotericists.blurb: Teacher of the Fourth Way and the Work.

esotericists.name: Eliphas Levi
esotericists.blurb: 19th-century French magus who shaped modern occultism.

esotericists.name: Franz Bardon
esotericists.blurb: 20th-century Hermetic magician, author of Initiation into Hermetics.

esotericists.name: Israel Regardie
esotericists.blurb: Chronicler of the Golden Dawn and ceremonial magic.

esotericists.name: Rudolf Steiner
esotericists.blurb: Founder of Anthroposophy and esoteric Christianity.

esotericists.name: Johannes Trithemius
esotericists.blurb: Abbot, cryptographer, and author of the Steganographia.

esotericists.name: Helena Blavatsky
esotericists.blurb: Co-founder of the Theosophical Society and author of The Secret Doctrine.

esotericists.name: Ramon Llull
esotericists.blurb: Medieval Majorcan mystic and combinatorial Art.

esotericists.name: Apollonius of Tyana
esotericists.blurb: Neo-Pythagorean sage and wonder-worker.

esotericists.name: Simon Magus
esotericists.blurb: Gnostic archetype of the magician.

esotericists.name: Valentinus
esotericists.blurb: Gnostic teacher of the Pleroma and Sophia.
